parameters.description: Fetches WiFi-related error logs from Graylog. Parameters: minutes (integer, how far back to search, default 60), min_level (integer, max severity: 0=Emergency 1=Alert 2=Critical 3=Error 4=Warning, default 3).

Searches WiFi logs in Graylog using a custom query string. Use this for targeted searches like 'deauth', 'auth fail', 'disassoc', 'beacon loss', etc. Parameters: query (string, Graylog search terms, default 'wifi OR wlan OR wireless'), minutes (integer, time range in minutes, default 60), limit (integer, max results, default 50).
